verses.text: Jerusalem khuamite aw, na kulh sung uhah lut un. Eite hong kiumcih a, Israel makaipa a hong sim uh ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Bethlehem Khua Pana Piang Honpa' Ukna

verses.text: Bethlehem Efrathah khua aw, nang pen Judah gamah khua neupen khat na hi a, ahi zongin nang sung panin Israel-te a uk ding khat ka piangsak ding hi. Ama gui pen tangtawng pek tawh kizom hi
Tua ahih ciangin, numei naupainu, a nau a suah khit mateng, amau' galte' khutsungah Topa in a mite a pia phot hi. Ama hong khan' ciangin sala a om a gammite a mipihte uh tawh hong kigawmkik ding hi
Amah in Topa' thahatna tawh a mite uk ding a, Topa ama Pasian' vangliatna tawh a uk ding hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in ama liatna phawk ding uh ahih manin ama mite lungmuang takin om thei ding uh hi
Amah in lungnopna hong omsak ding hi. Assiria mite in i gam hong simin i galdalna teng hong suk ciangin, amaute a do dingin i makai hatpen teng i sawl ding hi
A namsau uh tawh Nimrod' gam ahi, Assiria gam zo ding uh a, Assiria mite in i gam hong sim ciangin amaute' kiang panin eite hong honkhia ding uh hi

Tua ciangin a omlai Israel mite pen Topa in minam tampite-a' dingin a piak, lopate a nosak zing daitui, lopate a khangsak guahtui, a bang ding uh hi. Amaute in mihingte muan'in neiloin Pasian bek a muang ding uh hi
A omlai Israel mite pen minam dangte' lakah, gamlakah sa a beng, tuute a tuah ciangin manin balnen gawp a, a kam sung pan a honkhiazo a omlo, humpinelkai a bang ding uh hi
Israel-te in a gal khempeuh uh zogawpin a susiamang ding uh hi
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tua hun ciangin na sakolte uh hong paihkhiat sakin, na leengte uh ka susia ding hi
Na gamsung uha om khuapite susia-in, na galpan'na munte uh ka phelkhia ding hi
Na mitphial siamte uh susia gawpin, ai a san thei mi kong omsak nawn kei ding hi
Note' biak milimte leh na biakna songte uh ka susia gawp ding a, note' bawlsa nate na bia nawn kei ding uh hi
Na gamsung uha a om Asherah nusian milimte hong bawhkhiat sakin, na khuapite uh ka susia ding hi
Keima thu a hong manglo minamte tungah hehna tawh phu ka la ding hi.
